classification_inputs.predictive_attribute: Post-Versigent spin complexity discount; Wind River impairment marks software optionality reset

inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 pro forma post-Versigent: consolidated OCF $2,185M minus capex $656M = $1,529M; remaining segments ~73% of adj. operating income ($1,787M / $2,461M) → ~$1,102M ÷ ~214M diluted shares (10-K FY2025; 8-K spin 2026-04-01)
inputs.normalization_note: Excludes Versigent (Electrical Distribution Systems) after April 1, 2026 spin; excludes $648M Wind River goodwill impairment (non-cash); uses cash from operations less capital spending, not GAAP net income $165M

bear.notes: Auto production down-cycle, OEM price-downs, China volume shock; multiple stays at trough industrial-tech levels

base.notes: Post-spin focus on Intelligent Systems + Engineered Components; mid-single-digit volume plus content growth; exit ~15× normalized owner cash

bull.notes: Software-defined vehicle adoption accelerates Wind River and ADAS mix; margin expansion in Engineered Components; buybacks at discount

segments.label: Intelligent Systems (formerly Advanced Safety and User Experience)
segments.owner_cash_y0_source: FY2025 segment adj. OI $658M; pro forma FCF allocated 36.8% by segment OI share [Assumption]
segments.notes: Sensors, compute, ADAS, Wind River edge software; $648M goodwill impairment in FY2025

segments.label: Engineered Components (connection systems, interconnects, cable management)
segments.owner_cash_y0_source: FY2025 segment adj. OI $1,129M; pro forma FCF allocated 63.2% by segment OI share [Assumption]
segments.notes: Higher-margin interconnect franchise; electrification content tailwind

options.label: Wind River edge software platform
options.base_terminal_rationale: Software economics embedded in Intelligent Systems growth after FY2025 impairment reset; no separate terminal after $648M write-down
options.evidence: 10-K FY2025 Note goodwill impairment Wind River reporting unit $648M

options.label: Motional autonomous driving JV (equity method)
options.base_terminal_rationale: Equity loss drag; no disclosed fair-value mark or monetization path in base case after scan
options.evidence: 10-K FY2025 equity loss net of tax $38M; Motional AD LLC equity method investee

options.label: Versigent (EDS) spin-off value
options.base_terminal_rationale: Completed April 1, 2026; value received via distributed Versigent shares (VGNT), not in remaining APTV Lawrence path
options.evidence: 8-K 2026-04-01 spin completion; Separation and Distribution Agreement

segment_build.notes: Pre-spin FY2025 segment table; post-spin APTV retains Intelligent Systems + Engineered Components only

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Industrial operating assets; goodwill impairment taken on Wind River in FY2025

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Wind River embedded in Intelligent Systems after impairment; Motional equity loss drag

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: Automotive programs flow through segment revenue; RPO $172M per 10-K

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: Motional JV; equity method without base-case terminal

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution / legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: Versigent tax-free spin April 1, 2026; value in distributed shares not APTV FCF

option_scan.question: Embedded product option in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Electrification and software content in segment growth paths

growth_explanation.mechanism: Post-spin APTV participates in software-defined vehicle, ADAS, and electrification content per vehicle; Engineered Components benefits from higher connection counts in EV architectures
growth_explanation.source: 10-K FY2025 Business Strategy; Q1 2026 10-Q segment rename to Intelligent Systems
growth_explanation.bear_trigger: Global auto production decline >5% for two consecutive years
growth_explanation.bull_trigger: Intelligent Systems revenue growth >10% for four quarters with stable margins

theory_implied.derivation: segment_build owner-cash weighted blend (growth only; exit from scenarios.base)

paths.label: Segment-derived growth (pre-falsifier)
paths.weight_why: Segment blend before falsifier pass; diagnostic only when it differs from falsifier-adjusted.
weight_falsifiers: Included at full weight alongside falsifier-adjusted without divergence note

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative
